products.name: Centrifugal Process Pump
products.shortDescription: Single Stage Horizontal, End-suction, Back-pullout Pump.
products.description: We manufacture the Centrifugal Pump that includes the end-suction and back-pull out type centrifugal pump. Our heavy-duty pump is capable to handle a wide spectrum of corrosive chemicals, starting from strongly oxidizing solutions to strongly reducing ones, at different temperatures and concentration, which can be used in different process plants.

specifications.Impeller Type: Single Stage Closed & Semi Open Impeller
specifications.Bearings: One Cylindrical Roller Bearing on Pump end, Two Angular Contact Ball Bearing with Oil Lubricated
specifications.Drive Options: Suitable with V-belt Drive or Direct Coupled with a Motor

features: Single Stage Closed & Semi Open Impeller.
One Cylindrical Roller Bearing on Pump end, Two Angular Contact Ball Bearing with Oil Lubricated.
Suitable with V-belt Drive or Direct Coupled with a Motor.

products.name: Air Cooled Hot Oil Pump
products.shortDescription: High-temperature air-cooled thermic fluid and hot oil transfer pump.
products.description: Chem-X Pumps & Equipment has manufactured heavy-duty Thermic Fluid Hot Oil Pump, Edible Oil Pump. Its cost-effective with specially designed fins for natural convection. To drop the pressure on the sealing and to balance axial thrust, the impellers have back radial blades. There is a thermal resistant soft packing seal behind the impeller. It slows down the leakage and prevents the pumping to be stopped if there is a mechanical seal damage. Air cooled pump designed by Chem-X Pumps & Equipment represent the highest quality and most effective air cooled industrial pump in the market.

specifications.Type: Single-stage, end suction, centrifugal volute pump
specifications.Impeller Type: Single entry, closed impeller, hydraulically thrust compensated and dynamically balanced
specifications.Sealing Options: Thermal resistant soft packing seal and mechanical seal
specifications.Cooling: Natural convection air-cooling fins (no external cooling required)
specifications.Bearings: Two roller bearings in bearing housing

features: Single-stage, end suction, centrifugal volute pump.
Single entry, closed impeller is hydraulically thrust compensated and dynamically balanced.
Pump & motor are separate components, connected to each other via a flexible coupling & mounted on a common base plate.
Maintenance is very much easier, the impeller shaft & other rotating parts being removable with no need to disconnect the suction and delivery pipes.
Maximum interchangeability of components, identical parts can be used with various sizes of a pump, which greatly simplifies and reduces stock of spare parts.
No need to cool the pump externally. Thanks to mechanical design, the temperature drops from casing to the bearing rapidly with the help of natural convection.
The shaft is designed according to the minimum heat transfer criteria.
On the bearing housing, there are fins for natural convection. There are two roller bearings & mechanical seal in the bearing housing.

The mechanical seal stands between two roller bearings and close to the roller bearing on the coupling side. This gives the mechanical seal longer working life since it is on a lower temperature region.

Consistent Performance under varying operating conditions.
Low Noise and Vibration for smoother operation.

Engineered for smooth performance and long service life, the Chem-X PP Mono Block Pump is suitable for handling acids, alkalis, chemicals, and aggressive industrial liquids across multiple process industries.

products.name: Heavy Horizontal Slurry Transfer Pump
products.shortDescription: Severe duty slurry transfer pump with replaceable wear parts for abrasive mining.
products.description: Built to withstand the most punishing abrasive mining operations and tailings transport. With a two-part casing, it is possible to replace the worn front cover without changing the complete casing, making field maintenance quick and easy.

specifications.Casing Type: Two parts casing (worn front cover replaceable without changing complete casing)

features: Replacement of wearing parts can be done in the field.
With the two parts casing, it is possible to replace the worn front cover without changing the complete casing.
applications: Slurry pumps are used widely throughout the beneficiation section of the mining industry where most plants use wet separation systems. These systems usually move large volumes of slurry through the process.
Slurry pumps are also widely used for the disposal of ash from fossil fuel power plants.
Other areas where slurry pumps are used include the manufacture of fertilizers, land reclamation, mining by dredges, and the long distance transportation of coal and minerals.

products.name: Progressive Cavity Pump
products.shortDescription: Positive displacement progressive cavity pump for uniform, metered flow.
products.description: Inherently self-priming progressive cavity pump designed to handle solids in suspension, medium containing high percentages of solids, and shear-sensitive media with minimum degradation. Reversible rotation capabilities allow equal efficiency in either direction.

specifications.Operating Principle: Single rotating element, progressing cavities which deliver a uniform, metered & non-pulsating flow
specifications.Stator Design: Rotors turn inside a resilient stator

features: Single rotating element, progressing cavities are generated which deliver a uniform, metered & non-pulsating flow.
Head developed is independent of the rotational speed, whereas the capacity is proportionate to the speed.
Inherently self-priming, the pumps can work on snore & do not require a foot valve.
Can Handle solids in suspension or medium containing a high percentage of solids.
Suction lift capabilities of up to 9.5 mtr. and effective even in high vacuum conditions.
Minimum degradation of shear-sensitive media & can also Handle highly viscous materials having pseudo-plastic characteristics.
Due to the reversible rotation capabilities, progressive cavity pumps can perform with equal efficiency in either direction.
Rotors turn inside a resilient stator & thus generate little noise.
applications: Sugar, Starch, Cement, Pulp & Paper industries
Paint, Varnish, Petrochemicals, Vegetable Oils, Mining, Steel, Construction, Manmade fibers, Fisheries, Oil exploration
Pharmaceuticals, Cattle feed, Brewery & Distillery, Power
Dairies, Winery, Food & Beverages, Abattoir & Meat processing
Plantations, Fruit processing, Dye stuff, Textiles

products.description: Pneumatic air-operated double diaphragm pump designed to handle a variety of solvents, acids, caustics, and highly viscous or abrasive media. Intrinsically safe and capable of self-priming, running dry, and handling hazardous liquids.

operatingRange.Head: up to 70 mtr
operatingRange.Suction Lift: Rubber (Dry: 4.5 m, Wet: 7.5 m) | Teflon (Dry: 3 m, Wet: 6 m)

features: Intrinsically safe design - no electrical hookups required (explosion proof).

products.name: Centrifugal Monoblock Pump
products.shortDescription: Heavy-duty centrifugal monoblock pump with wide operating voltage range.
products.description: Chem-X Pumps & Equipment is a leading manufacturer of CCMP Series, known as Centrifugal Monoblock Pump. Combining pump and motor to form a single unit, it features non-overloading power characteristics and saves mounting space by eliminating base plates, couplings, and coupling guards.

specifications.Impeller Type: Single stage closed Impeller in Volute Casing
specifications.Suction & Delivery: Axial end suction and vertical centerline delivery
specifications.Motor Protection: Non-overloading power characteristics & wide operating voltage range

features: Horizontal, Centrifugal, Monoblock (pump & motor have been combined to form a single unit) type pump fitted with single stage closed Impeller in Volute Casing having axial end suction and vertical centerline delivery.
No fear of motor burning due to wide operating voltage range & Non-overloading power characteristics at any operating point.
Advantage of mounting space saving due to elimination of base plate, coupling and coupling guard.
applications: Industrial usage such as Cooling, Heating, Circulating, Boosting, Air Conditioning, Refrigeration & Cold Storage systems.
Agriculture usage such as General Irrigation, Sprinkler Irrigation & De-watering systems.
Civil usage such as water supply schemes for Buildings, Hotels & Commercial Complexes.
To handle clean as well as moderately aggressive liquids.
